name: Roasted Vegetable Soup with Garlic (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 1 large Sweet red pepper, cored and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Arrange the eggplant and onions in a large shallow baking pan. Brush the cut sides with 1½ teaspoons of oil and bake for 20 minutes.
3. Add the red pepper, tomatoes, and garlic to the pan; brush the cut sides with the remaining 1½ teaspoons of oil. Sprinkle the thyme, basil, salt, and black pepper over the vegetables and bake for another 20 minutes or until tender.
4. Set aside the red pepper and one eggplant half. Chop the remaining half eggplant, onions, tomatoes, and garlic and transfer them to a large saucepan. Add the stock, bring it to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer the mixture, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes. Meanwhile, peel the red pepper and dice the pulp. Dice the reserved eggplant.
5. In a food processor or blender, working in batches if necessary, puree the cooked mixture. Return the puree to the saucepan and stir in the diced eggplant and red pepper. Simmer the soup for 5 minutes or until heated through. Makes 6 servings. Per serving: Calories 107, Fat 3g, Sodium 232mg, Cholesterol 0mg, % Calories from Fat 25.4%.
